patterns.phantom_issue_reconcile: RECURRED R38: R37(06-15) created #39323/4 but never committed memory. ALWAYS gh api issues?labels=sergo&state=all&sort=created for issues since last_run BEFORE strategy; reconstruct missed runs.
patterns.impl_narrower_than_own_spec: STRONGEST land-arg (R38 ssljson). When linter embeds/references its OWN spec, diff impl vs that text. ssljson .github/skills/ssl/ssl.json:150 lists Pass-4 rules ('unique IDs','graph integrity')->2 unimplemented=2 spec-backed issues. Authority=repo's own artifact.
patterns.parsed_but_unused_field: Struct field decoded from JSON/AST that no validation rule consumes = asymmetric gap. ssljson SSLStep.SceneID validated nowhere while every other cross-ref is.
patterns.map_dedup_hides_duplicates: Lookup sets as map[string]bool silently collapse dup keys->uniqueness unenforceable. Fix: if m[k]{report}; m[k]=true.
patterns.new_linter_precision_audit: Per new linter: (1)detect type-identity vs syntactic; (2)ctx/control-flow/graph precision; (3)completeness vs Doc/embedded-spec. STRONGEST=impl narrower than own spec OR real prod TP sites.
patterns.enforce_readiness_run_on_prod: PROVEN R35-37: grep prod for pattern->TP sites=enforce issue (httpnoctx #39016, timeafterleak #39180, timesleepnocontext #39324 all landed/posted). Append flag cgo.yml:1123 zero-vio; convert first if non-zero.
patterns.syntactic_stdlib_match: ident.Name=='<pkg>' w/o TypesInfo->FP(shadow)+FN(alias). Correct: ObjectOf->*types.PkgName->Imported().Path(). ctxbackground:86 still syntactic(#38789).
patterns.alias_intermediate_var_FN: RECURRING land: gate on IMMEDIATE-parent AST shape misses intermediate-var. lenstringzero#37741, tolowerequalfold#37492, timeafterleak#39181. Fix=follow var by object identity.
patterns.new_linter_doc_lag: R34-37 recurring; R38 RESOLVED doc.go synced 29/29. Check main.go count vs doc.go 'All N'+bullets vs spec_test documentedAnalyzers() vs README.
patterns.ci_enforce_14: cgo.yml:1123 LINTER_FLAGS R38=14 (+timeafterleak): errstringmatch panicinlibrarycode manualmutexunlock osexitinlibrary rawloginlib regexpcompileinfunction fprintlnsprintf strconvparseignorederror jsonmarshalignoredeerror uncheckedtypeassertion fmterrorfnoverbs tolowerequalfold httpnoctx timeafterleak. NOT enforced: ssljson, timesleepnocontext, execcommand, ctxbackground, hardcodedfilepath, lenstringzero.
patterns.team_closes_fast: SIMPLE PRs land 1-2d (httpnoctx <1d). COMPLEX linger (execcommand 6d). Issues NOT always auto-closed on land (#39180 landed-but-open).
